mapper.select: SELECT id, borrow_record_id, user_id, device_id, overdue_hours, overdue_days, processing_status, processing_method, processing_remark, processor_id, processing_time, compensation_amount, notification_sent, created_at, updated_at FROM overdue_record WHERE borrow_record_id = #{borrowRecordId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, borrow_record_id, user_id, device_id, overdue_hours, overdue_days, processing_status, processing_method, processing_remark, processor_id, processing_time, compensation_amount, notification_sent, created_at, updated_at FROM overdue_record WHERE notification_sent = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM borrow_record b WHERE b.id = overdue_record.borrow_record_id AND b.status = 'OVERDUE' AND b.return_time IS NULL ) ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE overdue_record SET notification_sent = #{notificationSent}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND notification_sent = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM borrow_record b WHERE b.id = overdue_record.borrow_record_id AND b.status = 'OVERDUE' AND b.return_time IS NULL )

UPDATE overdue_record SET processing_status = 'PROCESSED', processing_method = #{processingMethod}, processing_remark = #{processingRemark}, processor_id = #{processorId}, processing_time = #{processingTime}, compensation_amount = #{compensationAmount}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND processing_status = 'PENDING'
